note:
110 ppl

Wedding Catering 125

Venue Highland Orchard
outcome_autofill_reasoning: The call was a substantive, engaged conversation between Andre (Conquito Catering) and Hugo Casillas, who is planning his wedding at Highland Orchard for ~110-125 guests. Hugo actively participated in building out a full quote — selecting proteins, sides, appetizers, and discussing linens. Andre walked through the pricing (~$10,856-$11,595 for 125 people). Hugo expressed interest in potentially attending a May 17th tasting ("that one could potentially work"), and the call ended mid-discussion on the linen pricing breakdown. No meeting was explicitly booked (Hugo was non-committal on the tasting), but the prospect is clearly qualified — he has a venue, a date in mind, a guest count, and is actively shopping caterers. A follow-up quote will be sent. This fits "Qualified – Needs Next Step" as the prospect meets qualification criteria (real wedding event, defined guest count, known venue, budget discussion underway), the agent acknowledged fit and intent to advance, but no firm next step (tasting or meeting) was explicitly locked in.

recording_transcript.summary_html:
• Proposed deluxe buffet menu for 110 wedding guests with three meats, three sides, salad, and cocktail appetizers totaling $11,595 with linens included.
  • Customized menu to accommodate fiancée's vegetarian diet and guest gluten-free requirements with cauliflower steak as alternative main dish.
  • Event confirmed for August 23rd at Highland Orchard venue; date available pending 20% down payment to lock.
  • Hugo declining tasting opportunity due to schedule constraints; plans to get competing quotes before making catering decision.
  • Andre offered pricing flexibility and menu adjustments once Hugo compares quotes from other caterers.

Event Overview and Venue

  • Hugo is planning a wedding with approximately 110 expected guests from 125 invitations.
  • The venue is Highland Orchard located in Sturbridge.
  • Hugo found Comeketo Catering through the venue's recommended caterer list.
  • Hugo's fiancée is vegetarian while he is a meat lover, requiring menu accommodation for both preferences.
  • A small number of guests are vegetarian, and a couple are gluten-free.

Menu and Service Discussion

  • Andre proposed a deluxe buffet service with three main courses: picanha, chicken wrapped with bacon, and cauliflower steak.
  • Side dishes selected were garlic mashed potatoes, rice, and vegetable medley with Caesar salad.
  • Appetizers for cocktail hour include bruschetta, fruit skewers, and traditional poncio queijo, plus veggie and charcuterie platters.
  • Hugo prefers to keep appetizers limited to cocktail hour items rather than extensive additional options.
  • The venue provides its own bar service, so no bar catering is needed.

Pricing and Quote Details

  • Initial quote for 125 guests with deluxe buffet and appetizers totaled $10,856 including service and taxes.
  • Linen service (tablecloths and napkins) added $739, bringing total to $11,595.
  • High-end disposable plates, cutlery, and service are included in the package at no extra cost.
  • Hugo requested the full quote breakdown including linens and all additional services be sent for review.
  • Price per person for the deluxe buffet is $37.90 with staff service included.

Website and First Impressions

  • Hugo noted that Comeketo's website homepage is overwhelming with too much information on a single page.
  • Andre acknowledged the feedback and discussed improving the website navigation with tabs.
  • Hugo received multiple automated emails from Comeketo since the initial contact.
  • Andre expressed preference for direct phone communication over automated systems.
  • Hugo appreciated Andre's personal approach to understanding the client's needs.

Event Date and Next Steps

  • Wedding event is scheduled for August 23rd of this year.
  • Andre confirmed availability for August 23rd with only one other 150-person event scheduled.
  • Hugo declined the tasting opportunity due to schedule constraints with busy Sundays.
  • A 20% down payment is required to lock the date, which Hugo is not prepared to commit to yet.
  • Hugo plans to obtain quotes from other caterers and will reach out with final decision rather than waiting for follow-up.

Negotiation and Flexibility

  • Hugo asked if Comeketo offers pricing flexibility when comparing competitor quotes.
  • Andre confirmed willingness to work with the head chef to find solutions and competitive options.
  • Andre committed to adjusting the menu and pricing to match Hugo's needs and budget.
  • The quote will be sent to Hugo for review before any commitment is made.
recording_transcript.summary_text:
- Proposed deluxe buffet menu for 110 wedding guests with three meats, three sides, salad, and cocktail appetizers totaling $11,595 with linens included.
- Customized menu to accommodate fiancée's vegetarian diet and guest gluten-free requirements with cauliflower steak as alternative main dish.
- Event confirmed for August 23rd at Highland Orchard venue; date available pending 20% down payment to lock.
- Hugo declining tasting opportunity due to schedule constraints; plans to get competing quotes before making catering decision.
- Andre offered pricing flexibility and menu adjustments once Hugo compares quotes from other caterers.

### Event Overview and Venue
- **Hugo is planning a wedding with approximately 110 expected guests from 125 invitations.**
- **The venue is Highland Orchard located in Sturbridge.**
- Hugo found Comeketo Catering through the venue's recommended caterer list.
- Hugo's fiancée is vegetarian while he is a meat lover, requiring menu accommodation for both preferences.
- A small number of guests are vegetarian, and a couple are gluten-free.

### Menu and Service Discussion
- Andre proposed a deluxe buffet service with three main courses: picanha, chicken wrapped with bacon, and cauliflower steak.
- Side dishes selected were garlic mashed potatoes, rice, and vegetable medley with Caesar salad.
- Appetizers for cocktail hour include bruschetta, fruit skewers, and traditional poncio queijo, plus veggie and charcuterie platters.
- Hugo prefers to keep appetizers limited to cocktail hour items rather than extensive additional options.
- The venue provides its own bar service, so no bar catering is needed.

### Pricing and Quote Details
- Initial quote for 125 guests with deluxe buffet and appetizers totaled $10,856 including service and taxes.
- Linen service (tablecloths and napkins) added $739, bringing total to $11,595.
- High-end disposable plates, cutlery, and service are included in the package at no extra cost.
- Hugo requested the full quote breakdown including linens and all additional services be sent for review.
- Price per person for the deluxe buffet is $37.90 with staff service included.

### Website and First Impressions
- Hugo noted that Comeketo's website homepage is overwhelming with too much information on a single page.
- Andre acknowledged the feedback and discussed improving the website navigation with tabs.
- Hugo received multiple automated emails from Comeketo since the initial contact.
- Andre expressed preference for direct phone communication over automated systems.
- Hugo appreciated Andre's personal approach to understanding the client's needs.

### Event Date and Next Steps
- **Wedding event is scheduled for August 23rd of this year.**
- Andre confirmed availability for August 23rd with only one other 150-person event scheduled.
- Hugo declined the tasting opportunity due to schedule constraints with busy Sundays.
- A 20% down payment is required to lock the date, which Hugo is not prepared to commit to yet.
- Hugo plans to obtain quotes from other caterers and will reach out with final decision rather than waiting for follow-up.

### Negotiation and Flexibility
- Hugo asked if Comeketo offers pricing flexibility when comparing competitor quotes.
- Andre confirmed willingness to work with the head chef to find solutions and competitive options.
- Andre committed to adjusting the menu and pricing to match Hugo's needs and budget.
- The quote will be sent to Hugo for review before any commitment is made.
